transcript: Speaker A: मला काल रात्री नीट झोप लागली नाही. [I did not sleep well last night.] Speaker B: I did not sleep well last night. Speaker A: मी वारंवार उठत होते. [I kept waking up again and again.] Speaker B: I kept waking up again and again. Speaker A: माझं मन शांत नव्हतं. [My mind was not calm.] Speaker B: My mind was not calm. Speaker A: विनाकारण चिडचिड होत आहे. [I am feeling irritated for no reason.] Speaker B: I am feeling irritated for no reason. Speaker A: अगदी छोटी कामसुद्धा कठीण वाटत आहेत. [Even small tasks feel difficult.] Speaker B: Even small tasks feel difficult. Speaker A: काश, काल नीट झोप झाली असती. [I wish I had slept better.] Speaker B: I wish I had slept better. Speaker A: प्रत्येक वाक्याचं तू इंग्लिश मध्ये लगेच उत्तर दिलंस, कुठून शिकलास? [You answered every sentence in English immediately, where did you learn?] Speaker B: मी रोज पंधरा मिनिटं एआय सोबत बोललो आणि तिथूनच शिकलो. [I spoke with AI for 15 minutes daily and learned from there.] Speaker A: कसं? आणि कोणतं एआय? [How? And which AI?] Speaker B: MySivi AI. यात एआय सोबत बोलताना ती तुला इंग्लिश बोलायला लावते आणि चूक झाली तर लगेच करेक्ट करते. [MySivi AI. In this, while speaking with AI, she makes you speak English and if you make a mistake, she corrects you immediately.] Speaker A: आणि पैसे किती? [And how much money?] Speaker B: फक्त एक रुपयात सुरू करू शकतेस. [You can start for just one rupee.] Speaker A: ट्राय करते MySivi App. [I will try MySivi App.]
on_screen_text:
ENGLISH
मराठी [Marathi]
मला काल रात्री नीट झोप लागली नाही. [I did not sleep well last night.]
I did not sleep well last night.
मी वारंवार उठत होते. [I kept waking up again and again.]
I kept waking up again and again.
माझं मन शांत नव्हतं. [My mind was not calm.]
My mind was not calm.
विनाकारण चिडचिड होत आहे. [I am feeling irritated for no reason.]
I am feeling irritated for no reason.
अगदी छोटी कामसुद्धा कठीण वाटत आहेत. [Even small tasks feel difficult.]
Even small tasks feel difficult.
काश, काल नीट झोप झाली असती. [I wish I had slept better.]
I wish I had slept better.
प्रत्येक वाक्याचं तू इंग्लिश मध्ये लगेच उत्तर दिलंस कुठून शिकलास [You answered every sentence in English immediately, where did you learn?]
मी रोज पंधरा मिनिटं एआय सोबत बोललो आणि तिथूनच शिकलो कसं [I spoke with AI for 15 minutes daily and learned from there, how?]
आणि कोणतं एआय [And which AI?]
MySivi AI
यात एआय सोबत बोलताना [In this, while speaking with AI]
ती तुला इंग्लिश बोलायला लावते आणि चूक [she makes you speak English and mistake]
झाली तर लगेच करेक्ट करते [if happens, corrects immediately]
आणि पैसे किती [And how much money?]
फक्त एक रुपयात सुरू करू शकतेस [You can start for just one rupee]
ट्राय करते MySivi App [I will try MySivi App]
MySivi
summary: A split-screen skit demonstrates instant Marathi-to-English translation. One character explains she learned English by practicing 15 minutes daily with MySivi AI, which corrects mistakes in real-time. The ad concludes with a call to action to try the app for just 1 rupee.
